title: When Fighting Trump Isn’t Enough to Win Another Term
description: A New York City congressional race shows the fractures on the left.
author: Russell Berman

title: The Flu-Vaccine Routine Is Breaking
description: Normally, the CDC's vaccine advisors weigh in on flu vaccines in June. This year, the panel is in disarray.
author: Katherine J. Wu

title: Ukraine Is Not Losing. Russia Is Not Winning.
description: A momentum shift that changes everything
author: Anne Applebaum

title: Cut Platner Loose
description: Just a few years ago, Republicans sacrificed an Alabama Senate seat rather than endure an unacceptable colleague. Will Democrats do the same in Maine?
author: David Frum

title: The Republicans Defying Trump
description: Panelists joined to discuss why the president could face pushback from soon-to-be former senators.
author: The Editors

title: The Philosophy of the Out-of-Office Email
description: These messages can be a rote obligation or an opportunity to make a grand statement about work and life.
author: Isabel Fattal

title: Why Trump Wants to Celebrate His Birthday With a Cage Fight
description: The president has chosen blood sport as the day’s entertainment for a reason.
author: Conor Friedersdorf

title: The First 18 Months
description: A Cabinet meeting with my son, who is exactly as old as the current administration
author: Alexandra Petri

title: The Congresswoman Who Got Trump’s Name Off the Kennedy Center
description: Representative Joyce Beatty sued over the president’s control of the arts complex. The effort to keep it open isn’t over.
author: Janay Kingsberry

title: What’s Eating ‘Putin’s Brain’?
description: Even Russia’s leading warmonger has run out of ways to justify the Ukraine invasion.
author: Simon Shuster

title: American Democracy Wasn’t Designed for This
description: Can our 18th-century institutions survive 21st-century technology?
author: Jeffrey Rosen

title: The Last of the D-Day Veterans
description: Joe Picard is one of the few left with a personal memory of the 20th century’s greatest military operation.
author: Kevin Maurer

title: The J6 Rioter Now Working at the Pentagon
description: His hiring is part of a dangerous trend in the Trump administration.
author: Will Gottsegen

title: ObsessionKnows What the TikTok Generation Fears Most
description: Avoiding vulnerability comes with ghastly consequences.
author: Emma Stefansky

title: The Supreme Court Has Invented a Right to Discriminate
description: Alabama gambled on the Court’s partisanship, and won.
author: Adam Serwer

title: The Old Campaign Playbook Is Dead
description: How influencers, podcasts, and AI are rewriting the rules of political campaigns
author: Charlie Warzel

title: Elon Musk Is Dropping a Boulder in a Kiddie Pool
description: He is about to take SpaceX public—pushing other AI companies to do the same.
author: Matteo Wong

title: Comedy’s Biggest Stand-Up Won’t Be Hollywood’s Next Leading Man
description: Nate Bargatze’s big-screen experiment is a bust.
author: David Sims

title: What Dogs See That We Can’t
description: Consciousness separates us from machines. Need convincing? Just take a good look at a faithful canine.
author: Boris Kachka

title: The Republicans Who Impugn Talarico’s Manhood
description: Attacks on the Democratic Senate candidate in Texas show the GOP’s narrow, anxious definition of masculinity.
author: Helen Lewis
